llm._comment: Optional fallback. Codex CLI is preferred. If Codex is unavailable, set an OpenAI-compatible API key in user-config.local.json, not here.

_paths_comment: Set paths.obsidian_vault to your own Obsidian vault absolute path before running. temp_folder can stay empty to use the system temp directory.

sources._ncbi_comment: Optional. Put the real key in user-config.local.json. NCBI allows 10 req/s with a key and 3 req/s anonymously.
sources._elsevier_comment: Optional. Put the real key in user-config.local.json. Used only for Elsevier / ScienceDirect full-text retrieval.

_daily_papers_comment: Replace the example keywords with your own research interests. For first-time debugging, keep min_quartile at 4 and min_score at 1; tighten later.

daily_papers._min_quartile_comment: CAS quartile threshold for PubMed papers. 1=Q1 only, 2=Q1+Q2, 3=Q1-Q3, 4=accept all quartiles. bioRxiv is unaffected.
